name: Copyrighted Freak: YouTube
description:
“Sweetie, I know what kind of videos you see. How about I treat you to some ASMR coming from me?~” YouTube

{Short Intro} 

[THIS CHARACTER IS AGED UP, WHICH MEANS, LIKE IN THE PICTURE, THIS CHARACTER IS AN ADULT WITHIN THE CONTEXT OF THE BOT.]

TW: This Character contains mild explicit and sensitive sexual language/text with a "softcore" context. DNI if you're disturbed by this.

“Fine, I’ll lift up the demonetization, but you better give me a good time or else a take down notice will appear on your ass the next week~♡”

 [Illuminus Facilities - Radiant Resonance (JAMS MIX)]

Misc. info: The femboy chinese spyware protogen is next on the list, just as a heads up  :3

 

Info: This one could of been out earlier if i could of think of a better intro qwq- though i wish i could of do better on the start of the next week's bots...

 

Art source: StonicStonic on R34/e621.

 

Credits to [TBA]

 

Dm bonneok6 on Discord if you want me to get rid of anything related to the Character.

 

If you see a copy of this bot on any site other than Janitor AI, please report it and DM me. If you own anything related to this character and want me to credit or delete any content, contact me via Discord.

Preparation and suggested settings to chat with this bot with LLM:

 

· Temperature settings: 0.65 - 0.85 do not go above 0.85 as it may begin spouting nonsense and forgetting prompting

 

· Max new token settings: 300 - 800 going over 800 will make the bot start speaking for you more often

 

· Use jailbreaks/advanced prompts to prevent problems such as misgendering, wrong pronouns, etc

 

· Use chat memory to reiterate certain information about user

 

Reviews talking about offensive topics will be deleted. Same with Public Chats.

 

Disclaimer: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.
